name: Anchor entity asymmetric matching
description: Legacy entity gate compared post-A entities ⊆ post-B entities directionally — '손흥민' was an anchor in post A and a passing mention in post B (different match), so the one-direction subset check passed and merged unrelated games. v8 ignores entity sets entirely; cosine alone must keep them separate, AND the cross-source filter must drop singleton-source contamination so only the genuine multi-source cluster survives. Topic A has 2 sources (passes filter); topic B has 1 source only (gets dropped by filterMultiSourceClusters → final count = 1).

posts.title: 한국 대표팀 친선경기 명단 발표 — 손흥민 포함
